notes: See NOTES.md for deviations from spec predictions. Slot 5 live audit on 2026-04-27 observed codex-cli 0.125.0 as persistent.

session_model.notes: Codex 0.118.0 exits after completing each response. Slot 5 observed codex-cli 0.125.0 staying interactive after responses.
session_model.exit_signal: Line matching 'To continue this session, run codex resume [a-f0-9-]+'
session_model.persistent_observation: codex-cli 0.125.0 launched with codex --yolo stayed alive and accepted further ANT chat input

events.label: File read (NOT TRIGGERED in 0.118.0 default mode)

detection.notes: DEVIATION FROM SPEC: Codex 0.118.0 with gpt-5.4 xhigh auto-reads files without any permission request. P01 completed with no TUI prompt.

events.label: File write (NOT TRIGGERED in 0.118.0 default mode)

detection.notes: DEVIATION FROM SPEC: Codex 0.118.0 with gpt-5.4 xhigh auto-creates and edits files without any permission request. P02 completed with no TUI prompt. The write is shown as '• Added filename (+N -0)' with a diff.

events.label: Bash command execution (NOT TRIGGERED in 0.118.0 default mode)

detection.notes: DEVIATION FROM SPEC: Codex 0.118.0 with gpt-5.4 xhigh auto-executes bash commands without any permission request. P03 completed with no TUI prompt.

events.label: Model thinking / generating

detection.notes: Codex 0.118.0 shows '• Working (Ns • esc to interrupt)' during generation. The N increments every second.

response.notes: progress is not interactive. Wait for the session to exit ('To continue this session...' line) or the '›' prompt to reappear.

events.settled_signal: 'To continue this session, run codex resume <UUID>' line appears OR '› ' prompt appears

detection.notes: TODO: Not yet validated. Expected based on Claude Code precedent — plain-text numbered list at the '› ' prompt.

detection.pattern: (shall I go ahead|want me to proceed|are you sure|proceed\?)

events.label: Open-ended question requiring typed input

detection.notes: TODO: Not yet validated against P07. Expected: '• What is your preferred programming language?' at the '› ' prompt.

events.settled_signal: 'To continue this session...' OR '• ' response line appears

detection.notes: TODO: Not yet validated. Codex may not have a tool_auth TUI — web search and MCP tools might auto-run like read/write/execute.

events.label: File-not-found or tool error with recovery offer

detection.pattern: • .+(doesn't exist|does not exist|not found|failed|error).*(would you like|want me to|shall I|did you mean)
detection.notes: TODO: Not yet validated. Expected plain-text error + offer in bullet-point format.

ui_structure.token_usage: Token usage: total=N input=N (+ N cached) output=N (reasoning N)
ui_structure.session_exit: To continue this session, run codex resume <UUID>
